name: kiro-projects-viewer
description: kiro-projects のプロジェクト状態（charter / backlog / needs / kiro-flow / GitLab）を可視化するダッシュボードビュアー
author: sandbox

scripts.test: node test/flow-relationship.test.js && node test/authoring.test.js && node test/review-handoff.test.js && node test/flow-bus-per-project.test.js && node test/task-status-offloaded.test.js && node test/flow-reconcile.test.js && node test/flow-park-cancel.test.js && node test/replan.test.js && node test/reset.test.js && node test/lifecycle.test.js && node test/hitl-review.test.js
